limitations: No quantified AI investment amounts, headcount, or program budgets appear in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 2 based on generic competitive framing only.
AI use cases are limited to one named internal tool (MyLearning); no deployed customer-facing AI use cases with metrics are described, capping concreteness at 3.

Risk disclosure references specific mechanisms (regulatory compliance costs, competitive harm, stranded assets, EU AI Act) and mitigation framing, supporting score 4, but no named oversight body or quantified risk exposure is cited in these excerpts.
Promotional language present in talent/learning section; treated as a claim, not a confirmed outcome.
